timestamp_digest_relationship.note: The relationship between the timestamp message imprint and the sealed packet digest has not been independently recomputed in this public fixture. A full recomputation would require the complete RFC 3161 response bytes and a declared digest comparison procedure.

certificate_trust_chain_validation.note: Trust-chain validation against a trusted certificate authority was not performed as part of this public disclosure fixture. Internal testing used FreeTSA CA material under controlled conditions; that validation procedure is not reproduced in this public bundle.

independent_time_of_existence.note: An independent time-of-existence claim is not established by this public fixture. NOT_CHECKED trust-chain status means no third-party time-of-existence assertion can be derived from the evidence available in this bundle.

synthetic_fixture_note: This is a fixed-time synthetic public reference fixture. The metadata record is present, but an RFC 3161 request/response pair is not included. Message-imprint, trust-chain, and independent time-of-existence claims remain NOT_CHECKED or NOT_ESTABLISHED.

timestamp_metadata_record_presence.note: This timestamp metadata record is present in the public fixture.

rfc3161_request_response_pair_presence.note: The public bundle does not include RFC 3161 request (.tsq) and response (.tsr) bytes.
